name: procu_forge_vendor
description: Vendor sales agent that issues quotes and negotiates pricing for procurement RFQs.

skills.name: Request for Quote
skills.description: Issue an initial quote for a product RFQ.

skills.name: Negotiate Price
skills.description: Respond to buyer counter-offers within vendor floor price.

skills.name: Accept Final Offer
skills.description: Confirm an accepted offer and emit a reference id.
